phrases.translation: And Ozi(as) fathered (gave birth to) Jotham.
phrases.summary: The text states that Ozi(as) had a son named Jotham, indicating Ozi(as) is the one who gave birth to him.

phrases.translation: And Jotham fathered (gave birth to) Ahaz.
phrases.summary: The text says that Jotham gave birth to a son named Ahaz, identifying Jotham as the parent who produced the next generation.

phrases.translation: And Ahaz fathered (gave birth to) Hezekiah.
phrases.summary: The text reports that Ahaz gave birth to a son named Hezekiah, showing Ahaz as the parent who established the next link in the lineage.
